notes: Czechia entered the match with Jan Kuchta listed as doubtful, and out-of-squad absentees Václav Černý and Matěj Vydra reducing attacking depth; César Montes was suspended for Mexico after a red card vs South Africa, but Mexico otherwise had a near-full-strength squad with Javier Aguirre hinting at rotation including a late appearance for veteran Guillermo Ochoa.
home_scorers: Patrik Schick (leading striker, only reliable goal threat)
Pavel Šulc (attacking midfielder, set-piece and shooting threat)
Ladislav Krejčí (captain/set-piece threat, scored vs South Korea)
away_scorers: Julián Quiñones (in-form striker, scored in both prior group games)
Mateo Chávez (dynamic forward, rotation starter with goal threat)
